title: Time Sensitive Targeting of a High Value Individual
description: Intelligence indicates a high-value individual (HVI) responsible for coordinating enemy logistics will be at a known safehouse for a limited window. Friendly forces must detect, locate, and engage the target before the window closes, while minimizing collateral damage and civilian casualties.

enemy_force.name: HVI Security Detail
enemy_force.disposition: Dispersed around safehouse in urban environment
enemy_force.most_likely_coa: HVI evacuates via vehicle upon detection of friendly presence.
enemy_force.most_dangerous_coa: HVI detonates preplaced IEDs and uses civilian shields.

terrain.name: Urban Safehouse District
terrain.description: Dense residential area with narrow streets and limited observation.

restrictions: No collateral damage to mosque or school
higher_intent: Disrupt enemy logistics network by removing key coordinator.
